root_cause.defect: Pre-publish attestation was built before transaction.stage() ran, using absolute .runs-scratch card_path values from CardNewsModule. CardNewsPublishGate._check_final_cards correctly rejects any absolute path, so all 4 cards failed as final_cards_invalid, leaving attestation.cards == [] and forcing manifest_paths_match == False.

fix_design.call_site: _run_card_news_output_transaction, immediately after transaction.promote() and CardNewsOutputSetTransaction.resolve_active() both succeed

test_infra_fix.issue: Windows short-name (8.3) vs long-name path mismatch caused CardNewsPublishGate._existing_repo_file's relative_to() check to raise ValueError even for identical directories
test_infra_fix.fix: patch _REPOSITORY_ROOT with self.root.resolve() instead of raw self.root, test-file-only change

next_rights_intake_contract: Real per-card origin/role/rights_status/rights_evidence (reference, review_status, reviewed_at), replacing hardcoded classification: technical_fixture

Real evidence[] entries (source_url or bound local record, reference_verified, topic_relevant/topic_relevance_note, authenticity_status) linked to each publishable asset_id, replacing hardcoded evidence: []
Real operator_checklist (operator_id, reviewed_at, source_opened, rights_reviewed, claims_reviewed, attribution_reviewed, final_asset_reviewed), replacing hardcoded operator_checklist: {}
Real campaign/disclosures review when applicable, replacing hardcoded commercial_relationship_reviewed: false
Must still only ever be built from committed, repo-relative card paths -- never .runs/.staging/absolute -- reusing _correct_committed_attestation's post-commit timing as the integration point
